Compliance.description: SOC1/2/3, ISO 27001, GDPR compliant; POPIA tools; no SA fines/reg issues; 94% projects on-time.

Customer Satisfaction.description: No HelloPeter presence; global Trustpilot shows UX frustration; app reviews mixed-positive; SA adoption strong.

Product Value.description: High value for enterprises; unified platform but premium pricing + high impl costs.

Innovation.description: AI Illuminate/Skills Cloud/Copilot; Gartner HCM Leader 10yrs; predictive analytics.

Customer Support.description: SA office/support line; partner ecosystem (Glyde); mixed global response times.

Accessibility & Security.description: Strong global security certifications (SOC 2/3, ISO 27001), POPIA support via Evisort CLM, mobile biometric access, no breaches reported in SA.

socialSentiment.summary: Positive SA news (780 orgs, partner awards); global UX frustration on Trustpilot; no major SA complaints.
